message:
chore: bump to v3.6.12 — RuFlo branding, portable MCP server config (#1679)

- Bump @claude-flow/cli, claude-flow umbrella, and ruflo to 3.6.12
- init mcp-generator: spawn `npx ruflo@latest mcp start` (was @claude-flow/cli@latest)
  for cleaner branding via the ruflo wrapper package
- init settings-generator: emit RuFlo-branded attribution
  (Co-Authored-By: RuFlo <ruv@ruv.net>; Generated with [RuFlo])
- Project .claude/settings.json: replace hardcoded /workspaces/... MCP path
  with portable npx ruflo@latest, wire statusLine.command to existing helper,
  drop invalid hook events (TeammateIdle, TaskCompleted, SubagentStart),
  drop ruv-swarm from enabledMcpjsonServers (not configured)

Co-authored-by: Reuven <cohen@ruv-mac-mini.local>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "claude-flow",
-  "version": "3.6.11",
+  "version": "3.6.12",
   "description": "Ruflo - Enterprise AI agent orchestration for Claude Code. Deploy 60+ specialized agents in coordinated swarms with self-learning, fault-tolerant consensus, vector memory, and MCP integration",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "type": "module",

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "ruflo",
-  "version": "3.6.11",
+  "version": "3.6.12",
   "description": "Ruflo - Enterprise AI agent orchestration platform. Deploy 60+ specialized agents in coordinated swarms with self-learning, fault-tolerant consensus, vector memory, and MCP integration",
   "main": "bin/ruflo.js",
   "type": "module",

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "@claude-flow/cli",
-  "version": "3.6.11",
+  "version": "3.6.12",
   "type": "module",
   "description": "Ruflo CLI - Enterprise AI agent orchestration with 60+ specialized agents, swarm coordination, MCP server, self-learning hooks, and vector memory for Claude Code",
   "main": "dist/src/index.js",
